debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
this : 0 ∉ uIcc a b
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b

failed_attempts:
cases le_total a b <;> aesop
  have hne : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], x ≠ 0 := fun x hx h => this (h ▸ hx)
  have hI1 : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => 1 / x) MeasureTheory.volume a b := by
    apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const continuousOn_id
    intro x hx; exact hne x hx
  have hI2 : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => 1 / x ^ 2) MeasureTheory.volume a b := by
    apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const (ContinuousOn.pow continuousOn_id 2)
    intro x hx; exact pow_ne_zero 2 (hne x hx)
  rw [intervalIntegral.integral_add hI1 hI2]
  rw [integral_one_div_of_pos ha hb]
  have key : ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2 = ∫ x in a..b, x ^ (-2 : ℤ) := by
    congr 1; ext x
    rw [one_div]
    rw [zpow_neg, zpow_ofNat]
  rw [key]
  rw [integral_zpow (Or.inr ⟨by norm_num, this⟩)]
  norm_num
  rw [Real.log_div (ne_of_gt hb) (ne_of_gt ha)]
  field_simp
  ring
